response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the 6+ years experience requirement with roughly 15 years across full-stack roles, including recent hands-on work with the core stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS) and directly relevant AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling experience at their current position. Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development) aligns well with the code-quality and process-improvement responsibilities. Gaps are minor: no explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience and only light Java exposure, all of which are learnable given the demonstrated breadth.
strengths: Deep full-stack TypeScript/Node.js/React experience across multiple production companies, including current AI-agent and MCP tooling work
Strong engineering-practice background: TDD, pairing, CI/CD, testing-tool authorship, and community teaching/workshops
Broad platform experience (cloud/AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes, MongoDB/SQL) plus high-scale systems work
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience listed despite it being a primary stack component
Kotlin/Java exposure appears limited and dated relative to the secondary-stack requirement
Vitest/Jest/Playwright not explicitly named, though general testing expertise is strong

key_factors.factor: Missing Nest.js and limited Kotlin/Java depth
